description_long: This chaise features a modern, sculpted silhouette with a continuous, flowing seat and backrest upholstered in rich brown leather or leather-like material. The seat is ergonomically contoured, rising smoothly into a tall, gently curved backrest that provides ample support. The upholstery is accented by visible stitching that traces the organic curves of the chaise, adding a subtle decorative touch. The base consists of slender, black metal legs and supports, giving the piece a floating appearance and ensuring stability. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban parks, upscale sidewalks, or stylish public lounges. The surface appears smooth and semi-soft, inviting relaxation and comfort.
description: A modern brown leather chaise with a sculpted, ergonomic form, visible stitching, and slender black metal legs, offering a sleek and comfortable seating option.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the chaise, highlighting the flowing seat-to-backrest curve and the visible stitching along the upholstery.
description_view_1: Narrow end view emphasizing the thickness of the backrest and the slim profile of the seat, with the black metal leg structure visible underneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the chaise's continuous, undulating form and the smooth transition between seat and backrest, with the metal supports clearly visible.
description_view_3: End view from the foot of the chaise, showing the flat seat area and the upright backrest, with the supporting leg structure beneath.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, gently curved, and seamlessly integrated with the seat, featuring a smooth, continuous surface with visible stitching that follows its organic contours. There are no decorative elements such as tufting or buttons, giving it a minimalist, modern appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, straight, and constructed from black metal, forming a minimalistic support structure that is slightly recessed to enhance the floating effect of the seat.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid brown with a smooth, matte finish and features visible stitching that accentuates the curves of the chaise. There are no patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no separate or loose cushions; the seat and backrest are formed from a single, continuous upholstered surface with integrated padding for comfort.
